title: 4 Dividend-Paying Tech Stocks to Curb Market Volatility Risk
text: Here we discuss four dividend-paying tech stocks - NTAP, AVT, AVGO and TXN - that may help investors curb the downside risk of current high market volatility environment.

title: NetApp: Value Stock Or Value Trap?
text: Investors seeking to derisk their portfolio, yet keep a foot in a cloud-related technology stock, will find NTAP appealing: profitable, cheap, and even paying a 3% dividend. Investors bullish about NetApp's prospects will point to the excellent leadership, shareholder-friendly and value-enhancing practices.
